sink_impls.note: Implements Sink for Standard<W> where W: WriteColor. Output format handler for line-oriented match display with color and context support. Dispatched via Printer<Standard<W>> in search.rs.
Implements Sink for JSON<W> where W: Write. Output format handler for structured JSON output with match metadata. Dispatched via Printer<JSON<W>> in search.rs.
Implements Sink for Summary<W> where W: WriteColor. Output format handler for count/summary statistics. Dispatched via Printer<Summary<W>> in search.rs.
Test-only implementation of Sink that validates UTF-8 encoding of matches. Used internally for searcher testing.
Test-only implementation of Sink that applies lossy UTF-8 conversion. Used internally for searcher testing.
Test-only implementation of Sink that passes through raw bytes. Used internally for searcher testing.

call_chain.name: search
call_chain.note: Selects SearchMode based on args.mode, creates matcher/searcher/printer and invokes SearchWorker.

call_chain.name: search_worker
call_chain.note: Called internally; constructs SearchWorker with printer argument.

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.note: Main dispatcher that selects based on path type (stdin, preprocessor, decompress, regular file).

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_path
call_chain.note: Routes to search_reader with Printer::sink_with_path(matcher, path).

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader (instance method)
call_chain.note: Routes to free function search_reader(matcher, searcher, printer, path, rdr).

call_chain.name: search_reader (free function)
call_chain.note: Final dispatch point. Calls Printer::sink_with_path() to obtain concrete Sink impl, then passes to Searcher::search_reader().

call_chain.name: Printer::sink_with_path
call_chain.note: Generic method on printer types. Returns SinkType<'s> that implements Sink trait (e.g., StandardSink for Standard<W>).

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.note: Final consumer: invokes Sink trait methods (matched, context, finish) on the concrete printer sink.

change_impact_map.change: Add pub re-export of new CSVSink and CSVBuilder types from csv.rs module
NEW FILE: Implement CSV printer module with CSVBuilder struct and CSV<W> generic type
NEW FILE: Implement Sink trait for CSV<W> with matched(), context(), binary_data(), begin(), finish() methods
NEW FILE: Define CSVSink<'p, 's, M, W> newtype wrapping internal sink state machine
Add CSV variant to PatternMatcher enum and update match arm in Printer type construction
Update Printer type alias to include CSV option (e.g., Printer<W> = enum Standard | JSON | Summary | CSV)
Add --output-format csv flag variant to defs.rs (large generated file; exact range depends on flag ordering)
Update HiArgs struct to parse csv variant from output_format flag
Update printer() call to handle OutputFormat::CSV and instantiate CSV printer with CSVBuilder
